@data.added: expr://flatten(map(keys($env['@producer']['@meta']['@relations']), {let relationKind = #; let uris = keys($env['@producer']['@meta']['@relations'][relationKind]); map(uris, dict(relationKind, dict('_object', #, '_relationKind', relationKind)))}))

expr://flatten(map(keys($env['@producer']['@meta']['@relations']), {let relationKind = #; let currentKeys = keys($env['@producer']['@meta']['@relations'][relationKind]); let oldKeys = keys($env['@producer']['@old']['@meta']['@relations'][relationKind] ?? {}); map(filter(currentKeys, !(# in oldKeys)), dict(relationKind, dict('_object', #, '_relationKind', relationKind)))}))
@data.removed: expr://flatten(map(keys($env['@producer']['@old']['@meta']['@relations']), {let relationKind = #; let oldKeys = keys($env['@producer']['@old']['@meta']['@relations'][relationKind]); let currentKeys = keys($env['@producer']['@meta']['@relations'][relationKind] ?? {}); map(filter(oldKeys, !(# in currentKeys)), dict(relationKind, dict('_object', #, '_relationKind', relationKind)))}))
